body.title: [sprint] Sweep reorg-fallout parents[N] repo-root path derivations to uu_root()
body.description:
The single-package collapse (a5f4dab0) moved device files one level deeper (devices/X -> unseen_university/devices/X) but left Path(__file__).resolve().parents[N] path derivations unchanged, so parents[2] now lands on the unseen_university/ PACKAGE dir instead of the repo root. Any such path targeting a REPO-ROOT dir (devlab/, skills/, wild_igor/) is now broken. Surfaced 2026-07-03 by the first live DS.0-on-Hex build: dicksimnel/device.py:38 _CC_QUEUE pointed at a non-existent unseen_university/devlab/... so DS.0 couldn't fetch ANY ticket (fixed inline, commit TBD, canonical uu_root()).

**Confirmed same bug (fix each — repo-root targets):**
- unseen_university/devices/vetinari/device.py:103 (_CC_QUEUE — Vetinari can't fetch tickets)
- unseen_university/devices/web_server/server.py:1319 (devlab/claudecode/stop_cc_minions.py)
- unseen_university/devices/installer/shim.py:30 (parents[2]/skills — skills/ is at repo root per feedback_skills_in_repo)
- unseen_university/devices/web_server/server.py:130 (parents[2]/wild_igor/web_ui/dist — verify wild_igor location)

**Do NOT touch (correct — package-relative target):**
- unseen_university/devices/web_server/server.py:1719 (parents[2]/devices/identities.yaml — identities.yaml genuinely lives under unseen_university/devices/, so parents[2] is right here).

**Fix pattern:** replace repo-root-relative Path(__file__).resolve().parents[N] with Path(uu_root()) (from unseen_university._uu_root import uu_root) — immune to file depth. PER-SITE JUDGMENT REQUIRED: confirm each target lives at repo-root (-> uu_root()) vs under the package (-> keep parents[N] or package-relative). Sweep ALL parents[N] path derivations repo-wide (grep -rn 'parents\[' unseen_university/), not just the ones listed.

**Affected files:** vetinari/device.py, web_server/server.py (x2 broken, x1 leave), installer/shim.py, + any others the full grep finds.
**Design rules:** uu-root-canonical (UU_ROOT via uu_root(), not fragile parents[N]); repo-wide-sweep-not-scoped (grep ALL parents[N], per reference_sweep_guard_extensionless_scripts).
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix every parents[N] that targets a repo-root dir to uu_root(); leave package-relative ones. OUT — the dicksimnel one (already fixed).
**Test plan:** per-fixed-site, assert the resolved path exists + is NOT under unseen_university/ when the target is repo-root (mirror tests/test_dicksimnel_cc_queue_path.py). A repo-wide guard test: no parents[N] in devices/ resolves to a non-existent path.
**Completion criteria:** every repo-root-targeting parents[N] uses uu_root() and resolves to an existing path; package-relative ones untouched; a test guards each.
**Rollback:** git revert.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
